title: ReSkins
description: ReSkins your Tools and Combat Items
body:
### **ReSkin** your Tools/Combat items with custom text in anvil.

***

![Optifine Required](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/451c3487a1fe5c66d87e5d916fc6a8e8ddefb5b8.png)
**Progress:** _5% complete_

***

![Netherite 3D](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1123055821736120402/1332849987922563195/image.png?ex=6796c0c8&is=67956f48&hm=d8ff30dcae3c93f678c1f0740b1ebaf4c51c77a0472a09874e169ba06460d8ed&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=309&height=147)

**Netherite Pickaxe**

*   0.0.1 Wooden 3D
*   0.0.1 Stone 3D
*   0.0.1 Iron 3D
*   0.0.1 Golden 3D
*   0.0.1 Diamond 3D
*   0.0.1 Netherite 3D
*   0.0.1 Dragon Pickaxe
*   0.0.1 Valentines Pickaxe _(Animated)_
*   0.0.2 Nora Pickaxe _(Animated)_
*   0.0.2 Purple Pickaxe
*   0.0.2 Voxel Pickaxe
*   0.0.2 Adventurer Pickaxe

**Netherite Axe**

*   0.0.2 Ruby Axe

**Netherite Sword**

*   0.0.2 Ruby Sword
*   0.0.2 Zelda Sword
*   0.0.2 Vanquisher Sword _(Animated)_

**Bow**

*   0.0.2 Ruby Bow
